claimText: The University of Sydney Academic Integrity Policy 2022 says students may only use assistance, including automated writing tools, if the unit outline expressly permits it, and students must acknowledge assistance used when preparing submitted work.

citation.citationTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
